name: almi-swiss
description: AlmiSwedish — AI-powered Swedish exam practice in the AlmiWorld family. Medborgarskapsprovet (the new citizenship society test, administered by UHR), Tisus for university admission, and the SFI / CEFR ladder, with honest per-skill readiness bands and AI feedback — no fabricated composite. Separate product (swedish.almiworld.com). Original content — never copied from official exam material. Practice estimates only; confirm current requirements with UHR and Migrationsverket.

scripts.build: node scripts/seo/countries-axis-gate.mjs && node scripts/seo/fork-hygiene-gate.mjs && node scripts/seo/real-entity-gate.mjs && node scripts/seo/uniqueness-gate.mjs && prisma generate && prisma migrate deploy && next build
